title: alyssum rigidum
intro: Alyssum rigidum, also known as rigid alyssum, is a flowering plant species in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various digestive issues and skin conditions. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of alyssum rigidum are often used to make teas, infusions, and ointments that can be applied topically or consumed internally.
